english translation text: SHE (ZAINAB) WOULD LAMENT ON THE BROKEN BODY OF QASIM

SOMETIMES SHE WOULD WEEP LOOKING AT HIS BODY,
SOMETIMES SHE WOULD LOSE CONSCIOUSNESS,
THE PLACE WHERE HER BROTHER’S BODY HAD BEEN TRAMPLED,
ON THAT PLACE SHE WOULD CRY

urdu transliteration text:
Farwa ne kaha beta Qasim, kehdena daadi zahra seGhurbat ki kamaai tukdo me, Deti hai sajaa kar haye qasim
FARWA SAID O’ MY SON QASIM,
TELL YOUR GRANDMOTHER ZAHRA
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
HERE IS MY SACRIFICE IN PIECES...
...I PRESENT THIS TO YOU (AND SHE WOULD CRY) O’ QASIM
